Document:
# Cyclorite
These intelligent inhabitants of the Abyss are emotionally reserved and have a single large eye instead of a face. They are strong but slow.
## Racial Features - Their punches deal [color=red]13[/color] blunt and [color=red]10[/color] structural, however they can only swing half as fast as humans. - They walk [color=red]15%[/color] slower than that of humans. - They fall into a critical state at [color=lightgreen]150[/color] points of damage. - They die at [color=lightgreen]300[/color] points of damage. - They breathe nitrogen. - They take [color=#ffa500]15% less blunt damage[/color] and [color=#ffa500]30% less slash damage[/color] than a comparable human. - They take twice as long to stand up from prone and double the stamina to push themselves up. - Due to their size, they stretch external clothing to such an extent that they can fit [color=yellow]two suit items[/color] on their back. - Their eyes are less sensitive to red colors but provide better vision in the dark.
## Poison and Medicine Changes Cyclorites suffer from metabolism issues that hinder them when injected with either medicines or toxins.
- Medicine is metabolised at [color=yellow]half strength[/color] meaning making medicines leave the bloodstream twice as fast.
[color=#999999][italic]Medicine that metabolise at [bold]0.5 units[/bold] per tick will instead metabolise [bold]1 unit[/bold] per tick. Healing amounts are not changed.[italic][/color] - Poisons metabolise at [color=yellow]double strength[/color] making them last in their bloodstreams twice as long.
[color=#999999][italic]Poisons that metabolise at [bold]0.5 units[/bold] per tick will instead metabolise [bold]0.25 units[/bold] per tick. Poison damage or effects are not changed.[italic][/color]
## Resistance to Movement Speed Changes Cyclorites being heavy and strong are [color=yellow]50%[/color] less affected by ailments and clothing that [color=yellow]increase or decrease[/color] their speed. Cyclorites are still slowed [color=yellow]100%[/color] from damage.
[color=#999999][italic]Speed decreases such as a hardsuit that slows them down by [bold]30%[/bold] only slows them down by [bold]15%[/bold][/color][/italic]
[color=#999999][italic]Speed increases such as speed boots that speed you up by [bold]50%[/bold] only speed you up by [bold]25%[/bold][/color][/italic]
